name: notion-obsidian-integration
description: Private Notion and Obsidian sync with an encrypted knowledge graph
author: João Lucas Oliveira with Codex 5.6

scripts.build: npm run build -w @grandbox-bridge/shared && npm run build -w @grandbox-bridge/worker && npm run build -w @grandbox-bridge/plugin && npm run smoke:worker-development-export
scripts.check: npm test && npm run typecheck && npm run build
